title: enteropogon dolichostachyus
intro: Enteropogon dolichostachyus, also known as the Golden Grass or Blue Grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to Australia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Enteropogon dolichostachyus can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
